concepts.section_title: ما هي شبكة الــــ DATA NETWORK؟
formulas_or_calculations: MATV/SMATV level design balances source level, amplifier gain, splitter/tap loss, cable loss, and outlet target level.
design_rules: Design the network as an expandable system: outlets, patch panels, rack space, switch ports, PoE/UPS, and copper/fiber pathways.
design_rules_ar: صمم الشبكة كمنظومة قابلة للتوسع: عدد outlets، حجم patch panels، rack space، switch ports، PoE/UPS، ومسار copper/fiber.
installation_checks: Check labels, cable route, bend radius, copper channel length, patch-cord dressing, and rack ventilation before testing.
installation_checks_ar: تحقق من labels، مسار الكابل، bend radius، طول copper channel، ترتيب patch cords، وتهوية الراك قبل الاختبار.
testing_checks: Test copper wiremap/length/loss and fiber OTDR or loss budget, then tie each result to outlet or fiber-core ID.
testing_checks_ar: اختبر wiremap/length/loss للنحاس وOTDR أو loss budget للفايبر، ثم اربط النتيجة برقم outlet أو fiber core.
warnings_or_mistakes: Sizing switches and patch panels for the current outlet count only, with no spare capacity.
Treating fire alarm as a normal data-network subsystem instead of life-safety infrastructure.

design_rules: Decide whether the system is traditional, IP, or hybrid, then align cabling, MDF/IDF, numbering plan, gateways, and power/network needs.

installation_checks: Check MDF/IDF terminations, labels, outlet type, voice VLAN, QoS, and PoE for IP phones.
installation_checks_ar: راجع termination في MDF/IDF، labels، نوع outlet، VLAN للصوت، QoS، وPoE للـ IP phones.
testing_checks: Test internal calls, external calls, transfer, emergency routing, caller ID, and recording or billing when required.
testing_checks_ar: اختبر internal calls، external calls، transfer، emergency routing، caller ID، recording أو billing إن وجدت.
warnings_or_mistakes: Mixing analog and IP endpoint assumptions in the same outlet schedule.
Ignoring voice VLAN/QoS and then blaming the handset for poor call quality.

concepts.group: Codes, standards, testing, commissioning, and handover
concepts.section_title: Cross-system codes, standards, specifications, and acceptance criteria
formulas_or_calculations: Acceptance criteria should connect each standard or specification to a testable result.
design_rules: Every standard or specification must become testable acceptance criteria, not just a named reference.
design_rules_ar: كل standard أو specification يجب أن يتحول إلى acceptance criteria قابلة للاختبار وليست مجرد اسم في المستند.
installation_checks: Accepted work depends on approved revision, material submittal, site condition, and a clear NCR or punch-item path.
installation_checks_ar: التنفيذ المقبول يعتمد على approved revision، material submittal، site condition، ومسار واضح للـ NCR أو punch item.
testing_checks: Each test sheet should connect system, location, asset, result, photo or reading, and signature.
testing_checks_ar: اجعل كل test sheet يربط النظام، المكان، الجهاز، النتيجة، الصورة أو القراءة، والتوقيع.
warnings_or_mistakes: Writing generic pass/fail without evidence.
Using specifications without mapping clauses to drawings, BOQ, and test records.
practical_examples: Convert a specification clause into a drawing note, BOQ item, inspection point, and commissioning evidence row.
